Event: Unknowable Adventure
Event Date: 04/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR354
Unseen Watcher Outfit

Every 5 sec., the fighter removes all negative effects from themselves and shoots a burst of magical energy at a random enemy fighter. The target and all enemy fighters within a small radius receive 750000 pure damage and are silenced for 3 sec. During this time, they cannot use any abilities (except for set abilities). For each fighter who was silenced, one random negative effect is removed from all allied fighters.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Unknowable Adventure

Event date: 04/12/2025

Sage bot code: AR354

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 5 secs
